exercises.code:
def read_until_blank(lines):
    out = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(lines) and lines[i].strip() != "":
        out.append(lines[i])
        i += 1
    return out

print(read_until_blank(["a", "b", "", "c"]))

exercises.code:
# while True + break para menú sintético
opciones = ["1", "2", "q"]
idx = 0
while True:
    cmd = opciones[idx]
    idx += 1
    print("cmd", cmd)
    if cmd == "q":
        break
print("salí limpio")

n_total = len(decisiones)

for d in decisiones:
    if d == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
tasa = n_reject / n_total if n_total else None
print(n_total, n_reject, tasa)

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(decisiones):
    n_total = len(decisiones)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for d in decisiones if d == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))

exercises.code:
# reescritura O(n) vs O(n²) ingenuo
ids = ["a", "b", "a", "c"]
# ingenuo: for i for j comparar todos los pares
# O(n): un set de vistos
seen = set()
dups = set()
for i in ids:
    if i in seen:
        dups.add(i)
    else:
        seen.add(i)
print("dups", sorted(dups))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Como explorer aplico «Aplicar break/continue y guardrails contra loops infinitos». En S04-T4-B-E3 resolví: Reescribe un conteo de pares reject-reject O(n²) ingenuo a un conteo O(n) de rej. Me guié también por «Trazar el estado de un bucle para depurar contadores» del paquete…
